# Data Privacy Act of 2012

Jurisdiction: Philippines
Region: PH
Citation: Republic Act No. 10173
Authority: National Privacy Commission
Source URL: https://privacy.gov.ph/data-privacy-act/
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, security_breach, accountability
Keywords: Philippines Data Privacy Act, NPC, personal information controller, sensitive personal information

## Summary
Philippine data privacy law covering personal information controllers and processors, lawful processing, rights, security, breach, and NPC enforcement.

## Key compliance obligations
- Identify lawful criteria for processing personal and sensitive personal information.
- Register or notify where NPC rules require.
- Implement privacy management, security, and breach response.
